name: Spice Cookies with Pumpkin Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the molasses.
4. Sift together the flour, baking soda, ginger, cloves, and salt; add to the batter alternately with the milk, mixing only until combined.
5. Drop by spoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Cool on wire racks.
8. To make the pumpkin dip, beat together cream cheese, pumpkin pie mix, confectioner's sugar, cinnamon, and ginger in a bowl until smooth.
9. Serve warm with additional sugar sprinkled on top.
